_comment: Pinned bundled mining engines for the Alice Miner. Each entry records the engine kind, target triple, on-disk filename, and the SHA-256 of the committed bytes so the resolver / packaging can verify integrity. The macOS arm64 xmrig (CPU-XMR lane) is PROVEN/live-validated against hk.aliceprotocol.org:3333. The kawpowminer (GPU-RVN/KawPoW lane) entries carry a PLACEHOLDER sha256 of all-zeros: the real binaries + their pinned SHAs are obtained at packaging time (M7). KawPowMiner is GPL-3.0, 0% fee, NVIDIA+AMD, cross-OS (PLAN section 6 D-GPU-miner); T-Rex is supported only via the ALICE_MINER_GPU_BIN override, never bundled. If a GPU binary is absent at runtime the resolver fails gracefully with a clear 'GPU miner not installed' status (no panic) and the RVN lane stays unavailable. The gpu-prl entries are SRBMiner-MULTI 3.4.1 (the pearlhash GPU mainline) with REAL pinned SHA-256 of the extracted binary, verified 2026-06-25 against the vendor archive md5 + a local sha256 of the unmodified release archive; 3.4.1 improves pearlhash hashrate on 3060Ti/3080 and fixes the 3.4.0 'proof validation failed' regression. The binary is staged at packaging (T6) by fetching archive_url + verifying archive_sha256 then the binary sha256 (SRBMiner ships no macOS build, so GPU-PRL is Linux/Windows only).

engines.source: PLACEHOLDER — KawPowMiner (GPL-3.0) Linux x86_64 build, pinned + signed at packaging (M7). RVN lane live-tested later on an NVIDIA box.
PLACEHOLDER — KawPowMiner (GPL-3.0) Windows x86_64 build, pinned + signed at packaging (M7). Windows is GPU-first (no bundled xmrig).

SRBMiner-MULTI 3.4.1 (freeware, closed-source) Linux x86_64 — the GPU-PRL pearlhash mainline. PINNED 2026-06-25: sha256 of the EXTRACTED binary (committed bytes the resolver verifies). Verified two ways: (1) vendor archive md5 SRBMiner-Multi-3-4-1-Linux.tar.md5 = 834f26b94aa17064d17f4649d9ea98e7 matched local md5; (2) local shasum -a 256 of the unmodified release archive = c2de6da8…6970f, member SRBMiner-Multi-3-4-1/SRBMiner-MULTI extracted + sha256 = 9335b57a…96f7. 3.4.1 (released 2026-06-25) IMPROVES pearlhash hashrate on 3060Ti/3080 and FIXES the 3.4.0 pearlhash 'proof validation failed' regression — upgraded from 3.3.9. Binary staged at packaging (T6) by fetching archive_url + verifying archive_sha256 then this sha256; ALICE_MINER_PRL_BIN is the override escape hatch.

SRBMiner-MULTI 3.4.1 (freeware) Windows x86_64, GPU-PRL pearlhash mainline. PINNED 2026-06-25: vendor archive md5 = 5962b5e4a67789c4bdd6cdcfdf3a70a0 matched local; archive sha256 = 73451074…0a81; extracted SRBMiner-MULTI.exe sha256 = e2fa2dd2…b39a. 3.4.1 improves pearlhash hashrate + fixes the 3.4.0 regression. macOS intentionally absent: SRBMiner ships no macOS build, so the GPU-PRL lane is Unavailable on Apple (capability matrix asserts this). Binary staged at packaging (T6) via archive_url + sha verification.
